lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh merges in the Naam. ||4||2||11||
Malaar, Third Mehl:
Those who are attached to the Guru's Teachings, are Jivan-mukta, liberated while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦ ਜਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat anadin sad jaage |
lines.english: They remain forever awake and aware night and day, in devotional worship of the Lord.
They serve the True Guru, and eradicate their self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਜਨ ਕੇ ਸਦ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hau tin jan ke sad laagau paae |1|
lines.english: I fall at the feet of such humble beings. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad mahaa ras meetthaa har kai naam mukat gat paaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is such totally sweet elixir. Through the Name of the Lord, I have attained the state of liberation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਜੀਵਾਂ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hau jeevaan sadaa har ke gun gaaee |
lines.english: Constantly singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, I live.
The self-willed manukhs are attached, foolish and ignorant.
Attachment to Maya leads to the darkness of ignorance.
Night and day, their lives pass away in worldly entanglements.
They die and die again and again, only to be reborn and receive their punishment. ||2||
He does not cling to false greed.
The Gurmukh is lovingly attuned to the Name of the Lord.
Among millions, hardly any understand.
He drinks in the sublime essence of the Lord; his tongue delights in its flavor. ||3||
Whatever he does, he does with intuitive poise.
The Lord Himself forgives, and bestows His glorious greatness.
Nanak is absorbed in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||3||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur miliaa su vichhurr na jaaee |
lines.english: Whoever meets with the Primal Lord God, shall never be separated again.
Malaar, Third Mehl:
But only by serving the True Guru does the mortal receive the Name.
Everyone speaks the Name of the Lord with the tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਕਲਜੁਗਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਵੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa kalajug raam naam hai guramat anadin hiradai raveejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the Lord's Name is the source of profit. Contemplate and appreciate the Guru's Teachings within your heart, night and day. ||1||Pause||
O my mind, why are you angry?
His bonds are shattered, and he stays in the house of liberation.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he sits in the eternal, unchanging house. ||1||
Each and every instant, the rainbird cries and calls.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਦੇਖੇ ਨਂ‍ੀਦ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin pir dekhe naneed na paae |
lines.english: Without seeing her Beloved, she does not sleep at all.
When she meets the True Guru, then she intuitively meets her Beloved. ||2||
She cannot endure this separation.
He is burnt in the fire of desire, and his hunger does not depart.
Lacking the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mortal suffers and dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin bhaagaa naam na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: Without good destiny, he cannot find the Naam.
He deals in corruption, filth and vice.
He performs all sorts of rituals until he is exhausted. ||3||
The mortal thinks about the Vedic teachings of the three gunas, the three dispositions.
The Gurmukh enshrines the glory of the supreme state of celestial peace. ||4||
He dies, only to be reborn; he is ruined over and over again.
One who has faith in the Guru - everyone has faith in him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: chahu jug sobhaa niramal jan soe |
lines.english: Throughout the four ages, that humble being is known to be pure.
Through the Guru's Word, the mind is cooled and soothed.
O Nanak, that Gurmukh is so rare. ||5||4||13||9||13||22||
Raag Malaar, Fourth Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਓ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਦੂਖ ਵਿਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: anadin har har dhiaaeo hiradai mat guramat dookh visaaree |
lines.english: Night and day, I meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, within my heart; through the Guru's Teachings, my pain is forgotten.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਬੰਧਨ ਤੂਟੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh aasaa manasaa bandhan tootte har har prabh kirapaa dhaaree |1|
lines.english: The chains of all my hopes and desires have been snapped; my Lord God has showered me with His Mercy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਬਿਗਸਿਓ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਬਨਵਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur dekh meraa man bigasio jan har bhettio banavaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Gazing on the True Guru, my mind blossoms forth. I have met with the Lord, the Lord of the World. ||1||Pause||
My eyes gaze eternally on the Lord, Har, Har.
